response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK C_CBC471
ATTR C_CBC471 : varchar : PK
ATTR given_name : varchar
ATTR family_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR seat : varchar
ATTR baggage_belt : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_code
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_label : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusHistory
PK flight_code, status_date, status_time
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=C_2D8B16
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=C_B7FEBA
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=C_EC6E73
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=C_50188A
REL Flight -> FlightStatusHistory : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_code
REL Passenger -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=C_5C3219
REL CrewMember -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
